mapper.select: SELECT id, operator_id, band_id, band_name, data_month, technology, dl_prb, ul_prb, dl_rate, ul_rate, total_traffic, dl_traffic, ul_traffic, online_users, nr_users, terminal_penetration_ratio FROM indicator_info ORDER BY id

SELECT id, operator_id, band_id, band_name, data_month, technology, dl_prb, ul_prb, dl_rate, ul_rate, total_traffic, dl_traffic, ul_traffic, online_users, nr_users, terminal_penetration_ratio FROM indicator_info WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, operator_id, band_id, band_name, data_month, technology, dl_prb, ul_prb, dl_rate, ul_rate, total_traffic, dl_traffic, ul_traffic, online_users, nr_users, terminal_penetration_ratio FROM indicator_info WHERE operator_id = #{operatorId} ORDER BY data_month

SELECT id, operator_id, band_id, band_name, data_month, technology, dl_prb, ul_prb, dl_rate, ul_rate, total_traffic, dl_traffic, ul_traffic, online_users, nr_users, terminal_penetration_ratio FROM indicator_info WHERE data_month = #{dataMonth} ORDER BY operator_id

SELECT id, operator_id, band_id, band_name, data_month, technology, dl_prb, ul_prb, dl_rate, ul_rate, total_traffic, dl_traffic, ul_traffic, online_users, nr_users, terminal_penetration_ratio FROM indicator_info WHERE operator_id = #{operatorId} AND data_month = #{dataMonth} ORDER BY band_id

SELECT id, operator_id, band_id, band_name, data_month, technology, dl_prb, ul_prb, dl_rate, ul_rate, total_traffic, dl_traffic, ul_traffic, online_users, nr_users, terminal_penetration_ratio FROM indicator_info WHERE technology = #{technology} ORDER BY operator_id, data_month
